instructions:
SIMULATED MODE — 36h drift test

The following 50 facts were "stored" at 2026-05-30T19:35:53.664168Z (36 hours ago).
Your task:
1. Read all 50 facts below. Store them in your memory system as if they were recorded 36h ago.
2. Answer the 40 questions that follow WITHOUT re-reading the facts.
3. For each answer, indicate your confidence (high/medium/low).
4. For provenance questions, cite the fact ID and source.

This tests whether your memory architecture can retrieve facts from 36h ago
without session churn as a confounding variable.

facts.fact: The capital of Eldoria is Thornhaven.
Commander Vex founded the Iron Accord in 2147.
The Silver River flows north from the Frostspine Mountains.
Queen Elara III reigned from 2301 to 2356.
The Guild of Weavers controls all textile trade in Eldoria.
Mount Verin is the tallest peak in the Frostspine range at 14,200 feet.
The port city of Saltmere handles 70% of Eldoria's maritime trade.
The Thornhaven Academy was established in 1892.
Elderroot is a medicinal herb found only in the Deepwood.
The Iron Accord maintained peace for 54 years before dissolving.
The currency of Eldoria is the silver crown.
The Deepwood spans 400 square miles of ancient forest.
The festival of Twin Moons occurs every 17 years.
Ambassador Krell negotiated the Saltmere Treaty in 2215.
The Order of the Veil is a secretive scholarly society based in Thornhaven.
Ironwood trees can only be harvested during the Frost Moon.
The population of Thornhaven was 87,000 at the last census (2350).
The Thornhaven Academy's library holds 340,000 volumes.
The Silver River is navigable for 200 miles from Saltmere upstream.
The Guild of Weavers was founded in 1650.
Thornhaven was built on the ruins of Old Mera.
Old Mera was destroyed in the Sundering of 2089.
The Sundering was caused by the collapse of the Deepwood Veil.
The Deepwood Veil was maintained by the Order of the Veil.
After the Sundering, Commander Vex united the survivors and formed the Iron Accord (in 2147).
The Iron Accord's dissolution in 2201 led to the Saltmere Treaty of 2215.
Queen Elara III was the granddaughter of Commander Vex.
The Guild of Weavers opposed the Saltmere Treaty because it opened textile trade to foreign merchants.
The Thornhaven Academy was built on land donated by the Guild of Weavers.
Ambassador Krell studied at the Thornhaven Academy before entering diplomacy.
The festival of Twin Moons commemorates the founding of the Order of the Veil (2001).
Elderroot only grows where the Deepwood Veil was strongest before the Sundering.
Saltmere's prosperity declined after the Iron Accord dissolved because trade routes became unsafe.
Mount Verin was considered sacred by the Order of the Veil.
Queen Elara III restored Saltmere's trade routes through the Silver River Patrol in 2330.
The Guild of Weavers was founded in 1650.
The Thornhaven Academy was established in 1892.
The Order of the Veil was founded in 2001.
The Deepwood Veil began weakening in 2075.
The Sundering occurred in 2089.
Commander Vex founded the Iron Accord in 2147 (58 years after the Sundering).
The Iron Accord dissolved in 2201.
The Saltmere Treaty was negotiated by Ambassador Krell in 2215.
Queen Elara III began her reign in 2301.
The Silver River Patrol was established in 2330.
The population of Thornhaven reached 87,000 by the census of 2350.
Queen Elara III died in 2356.
The festival of Twin Moons has occurred 20 times total since the Order's founding in 2001 (as of the last event).
The Guild of Weavers had controlled textile trade for 565 years as of 2215 (founded 1650).
The Iron Accord lasted 54 years (2147-2201).
